title: MetaReproducer: Automated Reproducibility Audit of 501 Cochrane Meta-Analyses
description: Pipeline code, results, and TruthCert provenance bundles for a large-scale automated reproducibility audit of 501 Cochrane systematic reviews encompassing 14,340 studies. Only 12.3% of constituent studies were openly accessible; among assessable reviews, 50% showed effect direction reversals.

creators.name: Ahmad, Mahmood
creators.affiliation: Royal Free Hospital, London, United Kingdom
